function.zh: 负责民刑法院、宗教法庭协调、法典推行与监狱体系
function.en: Oversaw civil and criminal courts, coordination with religious courts, codification, and prisons

name.en: Department of Public Works and Transport

function.zh: 负责公路、铁路、港口、邮电、供水与建筑工程
function.en: Directed roads, railways, ports, posts and telegraphs, water systems, and construction works

name.en: Department of Education and Public Health

function.zh: 负责学校监管、医疗机构、防疫、乡村卫生与师资培训
function.en: Supervised schools, medical institutions, epidemic control, rural hygiene, and teacher training

function.zh: 负责土地登记、农业改良、灌溉、林业与移民及定居相关土地事务
function.en: Administered land registration, agricultural improvement, irrigation, forestry, and land matters tied to migration and settlement

function.zh: 负责情报、镇压起义、边境巡逻、城市警务与交通安全
function.en: Handled intelligence, suppression of revolt, border patrols, urban policing, and traffic security

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依省、专区、县、市镇及村社组织。巴勒斯坦由各区专员与警察系统统治；外约旦依卡扎与部族辖区管理；叙利亚与黎巴嫩则沿法式省区体制实施总督与行政长官统治。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was organized through provinces, districts, subdistricts, municipalities, and villages. Palestine was governed by district commissioners and police structures; Transjordan through qadas and tribal jurisdictions; Syria and Lebanon through French-style provincial divisions under governors and administrators.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合奥斯曼遗产、英国普通法式行政条例、法国大陆法传统、宗教法庭与特别紧急条例。1939年巴勒斯坦仍处于阿拉伯大起义后的紧急状态，行政拘留、军事法庭与集体惩罚广泛使用。
legalSystem.en: The legal order mixed Ottoman legacies, British-style administrative ordinances, French civil-law traditions, religious courts, and special emergency regulations. In Palestine, the 1939 aftermath of the Arab Revolt still involved emergency rule, administrative detention, military tribunals, and collective punishment.

taxationSystem.zh: 主要收入来自关税、土地税、什一税遗留形式的农业征收、消费税、盐烟酒专卖或课税、印花税、所得税与交通收费。财政对港口、海关与间接税依赖很高。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came chiefly from customs duties, land taxes, agricultural assessments descended from tithe systems, excise taxes, salt-tobacco-alcohol monopolies or duties, stamp fees, income taxes, and transport charges. Fiscal systems relied heavily on ports, customs, and indirect taxation.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为多数人口信仰，逊尼派占主导；同时存在什叶派、德鲁兹派、阿拉维派、东正教、马龙派、梅尔基特派、亚美尼亚使徒教会、拉丁礼天主教、新教与犹太教等多宗教并存格局
religion.en: Islam was the faith of the majority, predominantly Sunni; there were also Shi'a communities, Druze, Alawites, Orthodox Christians, Maronites, Melkites, Armenian Apostolics, Latin Catholics, Protestants, and Jewish communities in a multi-religious landscape

philosophy.zh: 主流思想包括阿拉伯民族主义、叙利亚地方民族主义、黎巴嫩民族观、伊斯兰改革主义、世俗法治观念、犹太复国主义以及受欧洲教育影响的自由主义与社会主义思潮
philosophy.en: Leading currents included Arab nationalism, Syrian territorial nationalism, Lebanese nationalism, Islamic reformism, secular legalism, Zionism, and liberal and socialist ideas shaped by European education

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用阿拉伯字母；希伯来文、法文与英文在行政、教育、新闻与社群生活中广泛并行，亚美尼亚文亦在侨民社群中使用
writingSystem.en: The Arabic script predominated; Hebrew, French, and English were also widely used in administration, education, journalism, and communal life, with Armenian used in diaspora communities

culturalAchievements.zh: 1930年代的文化成就体现在阿拉伯报刊繁荣、民族主义文学、耶路撒冷与贝鲁特的出版活动、贝鲁特与大马士革的法阿双语高等教育、巴勒斯坦希伯来文化机构发展，以及音乐、戏剧与广播事业扩张
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural achievements of the 1930s included a thriving Arabic press, nationalist literature, publishing in Jerusalem and Beirut, bilingual French-Arabic higher education in Beirut and Damascus, growth of Hebrew cultural institutions in Palestine, and expansion of music, theater, and radio

languageFamily.zh: 主体语言属闪米特语系，主要为阿拉伯语与希伯来语；同时有印欧语系的法语、英语、亚美尼亚语与库尔德语等多语并存
languageFamily.en: The principal languages belonged to the Semitic family, chiefly Arabic and Hebrew; Indo-European languages such as French, English, Armenian, and Kurdish also coexisted

gdpDescription.zh: 整体经济处于中低收入水平，但区域差异显著：巴勒斯坦沿海与城市化犹太经济部门增长较快，贝鲁特和大马士革为商业与金融中心，外约旦仍以财政补贴和畜牧农业为主，叙利亚内陆以粮食、棉花和手工业为基础。
gdpDescription.en: The economy stood at a lower-middle level with strong regional disparities: the coastal and increasingly urbanized Jewish sector in Palestine grew quickly; Beirut and Damascus served as commercial and financial hubs; Transjordan depended heavily on subsidies and pastoral agriculture; inland Syria rested on grain, cotton, and handicrafts.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、柑橘出口、粮食种植、棉花、畜牧、港口贸易、铁路运输、建筑业、食品加工、纺织、肥皂制造、卷烟、采石、水泥与小型制造业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, citrus export, grain cultivation, cotton, livestock, port trade, railway transport, construction, food processing, textiles, soap making, cigarettes, quarrying, cement, and small-scale manufacturing

tradeGoods.zh: 出口商品包括柑橘、橄榄油、棉花、谷物、羊毛、皮革、肥皂与葡萄酒；进口商品包括机械、纺织品、燃料、车辆、药品、纸张、金属制品与军需物资
tradeGoods.en: Exports included citrus, olive oil, cotton, grain, wool, hides, soap, and wine; imports included machinery, textiles, fuel, vehicles, pharmaceuticals, paper, metal goods, and military supplies

name.zh: 巴勒斯坦镑、叙利亚-黎巴嫩镑与外约旦流通的巴勒斯坦镑
name.en: Palestine pound, Syrian-Lebanese pound, and the Palestine pound circulating in Transjordan

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布极不均衡。沿海城市商人、银行家、地主和部分新兴专业中产拥有较高资产，而农村佃农、无地农民和城市非熟练工人常处于债务与贫困边缘。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Coastal urban merchants, bankers, landlords, and parts of the emerging professional middle class held substantial assets, while tenant farmers, landless peasants, and unskilled urban workers often lived on the edge of debt and poverty.

economicSystem.zh: 殖民框架下的混合市场经济，由港口贸易、土地收益、关税与外来资本驱动，并受英法战略规划、特许企业、公共垄断和国际市场波动影响
economicSystem.en: A mixed market economy within a colonial framework, driven by port commerce, land income, customs, and foreign capital, and shaped by British and French strategic planning, concessionary enterprises, public monopolies, and international market fluctuations

source.zh: 宗主国补助与特别拨款
source.en: Mandatory power subsidies and special grants

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库并非统一单一账户，而是分散于英国与法国委任地财政、地方准备金、货币委员会储备与受管制银行体系中。战前安全支出扩大使财政缓冲趋于紧张。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was not a single unified fund but was dispersed across British and French mandate budgets, local reserves, currency board backing, and regulated banking structures. Expanding prewar security spending put pressure on fiscal cushions.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏保守，重视预算平衡、货币稳定和治安优先；但在1936至1939年巴勒斯坦起义及欧洲危机背景下，安全开支显著上升，外约旦对英方补助依赖持续。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally conservative, emphasizing balanced budgets, monetary stability, and security first; yet under the Palestine Revolt of 1936-1939 and the European crisis, security spending rose sharply, while Transjordan remained dependent on British subsidies.

name.zh: 殖民驻军与正规野战部队
name.en: Colonial garrisons and regular field forces

description.zh: 包括驻巴勒斯坦、外约旦、叙利亚和黎巴嫩的英军与法军正规部队，用于守备、威慑与战时集结
description.en: Included regular British and French troops stationed in Palestine, Transjordan, Syria, and Lebanon for garrison duty, deterrence, and wartime concentration

description.zh: 由巴勒斯坦警察、外约旦边防军和阿拉伯军团、叙利亚与黎巴嫩宪兵及地方治安部队构成，承担内部镇压和边境巡逻
description.en: Comprised the Palestine Police, Transjordan Frontier Force and Arab Legion, Syrian and Lebanese gendarmerie, and local security bodies tasked with internal repression and border patrol

name.zh: 辅助部队与地方征募单位
name.en: Auxiliary forces and locally recruited units

description.zh: 包括特别夜间分队、铁路守备、地方不正规辅助队、黎凡特特种部队及部族征募单位
description.en: Included special night squads, railway guards, irregular auxiliaries, Levant Special Troops, and tribal levies

description.zh: 涵盖动员后备人员、工兵、运输、通信、医疗和仓储组织，为大战准备提供支撑
description.en: Covered mobilizable reservists, engineers, transport, communications, medical, and depot organizations supporting war preparation

commanderInChief.zh: 英法中东驻军总司令体系、高级专员与外约旦阿拉伯军团指挥部并行
commanderInChief.en: Parallel command structures of British and French Middle Eastern military commands, high commissioners, and the Arab Legion command in Transjordan

technology.zh: 军备水平属两次大战之间的殖民战争技术阶段，拥有步枪、机枪、火炮、装甲车、少量坦克、军用卡车、无线电与有限航空支援；铁路和港口对战略机动极重要。
technology.en: Military capability reflected interwar colonial-warfare technology, with rifles, machine guns, artillery, armored cars, a few tanks, military trucks, radio, and limited air support; railways and ports were crucial for strategic mobility.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自巴勒斯坦阿拉伯起义余波、阿拉伯民族主义与反殖民组织、犹太人与阿拉伯人间紧张关系、部族边境骚乱，以及欧洲大战可能将黎凡特变为对德意作战前线。
threats.en: Primary threats came from the aftermath of the Arab Revolt in Palestine, Arab nationalist and anti-colonial movements, Jewish-Arab tensions, tribal unrest along frontiers, and the possibility that the Levant would become a wartime front against Germany and Italy.

populationDescription.zh: 总人口约六百万，人口分布不均。叙利亚人口最多，其次为巴勒斯坦与黎巴嫩，外约旦人口最少。多数居民为阿拉伯语人口，但宗教、地方与族群差异极大，且巴勒斯坦犹太移民增长已明显改变部分地区结构。
populationDescription.en: The total population was about six million and unevenly distributed. Syria was the most populous, followed by Palestine and Lebanon, with Transjordan the least populated. Most inhabitants were Arabic-speaking, but religious, regional, and ethnic differences were substantial, and Jewish immigration had already markedly altered the demographic structure of parts of Palestine.

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括殖民官员与欧洲侨民、哈希姆统治集团、城市地主与商人、宗教与社群领袖、专业中产、农民、贝都因部族成员、工匠、港口工人与失业贫民。巴勒斯坦还存在组织化程度较高的犹太工人和定居社群。
socialClasses.en: Major social classes included colonial officials and European expatriates, the Hashemite ruling circle, urban landlords and merchants, religious and communal leaders, professional middle classes, peasants, Bedouin tribesmen, artisans, port laborers, and unemployed poor. Palestine also had highly organized Jewish labor and settlement communities.

allies.zh: 名义上属于英法帝国体系，因此与英国本土、法国第三共和国、外约旦的哈希姆伊拉克、埃及及其他英法控制区保持协作关系
allies.en: Nominally aligned within the British and French imperial systems, and therefore connected to the British home state, the French Third Republic, Hashemite Iraq, Egypt, and other British- and French-controlled territories

enemies.zh: 直接敌对者主要是本地反殖民与民族主义武装；战略层面则担忧纳粹德国、法西斯意大利及其在阿拉伯世界的宣传渗透
enemies.en: Immediate enemies were chiefly local anti-colonial and nationalist armed groups; at the strategic level there was growing concern over Nazi Germany, Fascist Italy, and their propaganda penetration in the Arab world

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策并非自主制定，而由伦敦与巴黎主导。核心目标是维护苏伊士与东地中海通道、遏制德意影响、稳定边境、管理犹太移民与阿拉伯反抗，并通过有限宪政让步拖延独立要求。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was not independently formulated but directed from London and Paris. Core aims were securing the Suez and eastern Mediterranean routes, limiting German and Italian influence, stabilizing borders, managing Jewish immigration and Arab resistance, and delaying independence demands through limited constitutional concessions.

era.zh: 第二次世界大战前夕的机械化与通信时代
era.en: The mechanized and communications age on the eve of the Second World War

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术包括铁路网、港口现代化、汽车运输、无线电通信、电报电话、城市电力系统、近代医院、机场与军用航空设施，以及巴勒斯坦部分地区较先进的灌溉、建筑和工业设备
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies included railway networks, modernized ports, motor transport, radio communications, telegraph and telephone systems, urban electric grids, modern hospitals, airfields and military aviation facilities, and relatively advanced irrigation, construction, and industrial equipment in parts of Palestine

strengths.zh: 地理位置极其重要，连接地中海、阿拉伯内陆与苏伊士方向；港口与铁路体系较发达；拥有受英法保护的行政网络；教育、出版与商业中心活跃；巴勒斯坦部分地区经济现代化速度较快。
strengths.en: Its geographic position was highly strategic, linking the Mediterranean, the Arab interior, and the Suez direction; ports and railways were comparatively developed; administrative networks were backed by British and French power; educational, publishing, and commercial centers were active; and parts of Palestine were modernizing rapidly.

weaknesses.zh: 政治合法性薄弱，民族主义高涨，宗教与族群分裂严重，城乡贫富差距明显，农村土地问题尖锐，对外部资本和宗主国军事保护依赖深重，且巴勒斯坦危机已接近长期内战化。
weaknesses.en: Political legitimacy was weak, nationalism was rising, sectarian and ethnic divisions were severe, urban-rural inequality was pronounced, rural land problems were acute, dependence on external capital and imperial military protection was deep, and the Palestine crisis was approaching a prolonged condition of civil conflict.

outlook.zh: 1939年的前景高度不稳。随着欧洲大战爆发，黎凡特将更深地卷入帝国战争机器。短期内英法可凭军事与财政优势维持统治，但中长期民族独立运动、巴勒斯坦阿犹冲突及法国本土危机都将严重动摇现存委任秩序。
outlook.en: The outlook in 1939 was highly unstable. With the outbreak of European war, the Levant would be drawn more deeply into imperial war systems. In the short term Britain and France could maintain control through military and fiscal superiority, but in the medium and long term nationalist independence movements, the Arab-Jewish conflict in Palestine, and crises in metropolitan France would seriously undermine the existing mandate order.

description.zh: 黎凡特在1939年仍受英法托管及保护国体制支配，并存在强烈民族主义运动。
description.en: In 1939, the Levant remained under British and French mandate or protectorate systems amid strong nationalist movements.

name.zh: 阿拉伯半岛诸政权（沙特阿拉伯、也门穆塔瓦基利亚王国与海湾酋长国）
name.en: Arabian Peninsula Polities (Saudi Arabia, the Mutawakkilite Kingdom of Yemen, and the Gulf Sheikhdoms)

ruler.zh: 阿卜杜勒阿齐兹·伊本·沙特、叶海亚·穆罕默德·哈米德丁及各海湾酋长
ruler.en: Abdulaziz Ibn Saud, Yahya Muhammad Hamid ed-Din, and various Gulf sheikhs

rulerTitle.zh: 国王、伊玛目兼国王、酋长

dynasty.zh: 沙特家族、哈米德丁王朝及海湾各统治家族
dynasty.en: House of Saud, the Hamid al-Din dynasty, and the Gulf ruling families

capital.zh: 利雅得、萨那及海湾诸首府
capital.en: Riyadh, Sana'a, and various Gulf seats

governmentForm.zh: 以君主制为主的分散区域政治体系，包括中央集权王国、宰德派伊玛目王国与英国保护下的世袭酋长国
governmentForm.en: A regionally fragmented monarchical political system composed of a centralized kingdom, a Zaydi imamate-kingdom, and hereditary sheikhdoms under British protection

socialStructure.zh: 社会以部落、宗教权威、城市商人和乡村农牧民为核心。内志与阿赫萨地区由部落与宗教盟约支撑王权；也门高地以赛义德、部族首领、法学者与农民构成等级结构；海湾沿海则由统治家族、珍珠业商人、航海者、渔民与外来劳工组成。
socialStructure.en: Society was centered on tribes, religious authority, urban merchants, and rural cultivators and pastoralists. In Najd and al-Hasa, royal power rested on tribal alliances and religious legitimacy; the Yemeni highlands were structured around sayyids, tribal shaykhs, jurists, and peasants; the Gulf coast was organized around ruling families, pearl merchants, sailors, fishermen, and migrant labor.

rulingClass.zh: 统治阶层由沙特王室、也门哈米德丁王朝、海湾酋长家族、宗教学者、部落首领和主要商人组成
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of the Saudi royal house, the Hamid al-Din dynasty of Yemen, Gulf ruling families, religious scholars, tribal chiefs, and leading merchants

succession.zh: 总体上实行世袭继承，但具体规则因政体而异：沙特王位在王室内部按家族共识与指定继承运作；也门由伊玛目家族掌权并带有宗教合法性；海湾酋长国通常由家族长支或经家族协商继位
succession.en: Succession was broadly hereditary but varied by polity: the Saudi throne operated through dynastic designation and family consensus; Yemen was ruled by an imam-king whose legitimacy was tied to dynastic and religious standing; Gulf sheikhdoms generally passed to a senior branch of the ruling family or by intra-family agreement

structure.zh: 1939年的阿拉伯半岛并非单一国家，而是多个阿拉伯君主政体的并存体系。沙特阿拉伯于1932年正式统一后，以国王为核心，通过王室亲族、省长、卡迪、埃米尔和部落协约进行统治；也门穆塔瓦基利亚王国由伊玛目兼国王统治，中央机构有限，依靠宗教法、地方总督和部落妥协维持；海湾酋长国则多为小型世袭政体，内政由酋长主持，外交和防务在不同程度上受英国条约体系影响。
structure.en: The Arabian Peninsula in 1939 was not a single state but a coexistence of several Arab monarchies. Saudi Arabia, formally unified in 1932, was ruled by a king through royal kinsmen, provincial governors, qadis, amirs, and tribal agreements; the Mutawakkilite Kingdom of Yemen was governed by the imam-king with limited central institutions, relying on sharia, provincial governors, and tribal compromise; the Gulf sheikhdoms were mostly small hereditary polities in which domestic rule was exercised by sheikhs while foreign affairs and defense were influenced to varying degrees by the British treaty system.

function.zh: 负责君主诏令、王室联络、接见、礼仪和对地方统治者与部族首领的协调
function.en: Handled royal decrees, dynastic communications, audiences, protocol, and coordination with local rulers and tribal leaders

function.zh: 管理省区、城镇治安、地方长官任命、部落关系与边境控制
function.en: Managed provinces, urban order, appointments of local officials, tribal relations, and border control

function.zh: 监督伊斯兰法庭、法学者、瓦克夫事务、教育性宗教机构及宗教合法性
function.en: Supervised sharia courts, jurists, waqf matters, religious educational institutions, and confessional legitimacy

function.zh: 征收关税、天课、商税、港口收入和王室财政款项，管理预算与债务
function.en: Collected customs duties, zakat, commercial taxes, port revenues, and royal fiscal receipts, and managed budgets and debts

function.zh: 处理与英国、伊拉克、也门、外部列强和海湾保护条约体系的关系
function.en: Managed relations with Britain, Iraq, Yemen, external powers, and the Gulf protectorate treaty system

function.zh: 负责港口管理、海关辅助、邮政、无线电和有限的道路运输事务
function.en: Oversaw port management, customs support, postal services, wireless communications, and limited road transport matters

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政高度不均衡。沙特在内志、汉志、阿赫萨和阿西尔设有由王室成员或亲信主持的省级治理结构，县乡层面依赖部落首领、地方埃米尔与宗教法官；也门的中央穿透力较弱，高地和部落地区多靠谈判与间接统治；海湾酋长国行政规模很小，以宫廷书记、港口官员、税务员和酋长亲属治理。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was highly uneven. Saudi Arabia maintained provincial governance in Najd, the Hejaz, al-Hasa, and Asir under royal family members or trusted appointees, while district and village affairs depended on tribal shaykhs, local amirs, and religious judges; Yemen's central reach was weaker, especially in tribal and highland areas, and relied heavily on negotiation and indirect control; the Gulf sheikhdoms had very small administrations run by court secretaries, port officials, tax collectors, and relatives of the sheikhs.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以伊斯兰法为基础。沙特主要依循罕百里法学和瓦哈比宗教解释；也门以宰德派法理为核心，并保留地方习惯法；海湾酋长国在民事与个人身份事务上普遍适用逊尼派伊斯兰法与习惯法，涉外贸易和英国臣民案件在部分地区受英国政治代理体系影响。
legalSystem.en: The legal order was based on Islamic law. Saudi Arabia followed primarily Hanbali jurisprudence and Wahhabi religious interpretation; Yemen centered on Zaydi legal doctrine while retaining local customary law; the Gulf sheikhdoms generally applied Sunni Islamic law and custom in civil and personal matters, while foreign trade disputes and cases involving British subjects were in some places shaped by British political agency arrangements.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、天课、港口费、市场税、朝觐相关收入、地租和若干传统征收为主。沙特财政尤其依赖朝觐与关税，但在1930年代因大萧条与交通变化而受冲击；也门依赖农业税、关卡税与港口征收；海湾酋长国主要依靠关税、珍珠业附加收费和贸易税。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on customs duties, zakat, port fees, market taxes, pilgrimage-related income, rents, and various traditional levies. Saudi finances depended especially on pilgrimage and customs receipts, though these were badly affected in the 1930s by the Great Depression and changes in transportation; Yemen relied on agricultural taxation, transit tolls, and port collections; the Gulf sheikhdoms depended chiefly on customs, pearl-related fees, and trade taxes.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教占绝对主导地位。沙特以逊尼派、特别是瓦哈比改革传统为国家合法性的支柱；也门北部以宰德派什叶派为主，同时存在逊尼派社群；海湾沿岸大多为逊尼派，也有什叶派商民社群，尤其在巴林和东阿拉伯沿岸。
religion.en: Islam overwhelmingly dominated public life. Saudi Arabia drew its legitimacy from Sunni Islam, especially the Wahhabi reform tradition; northern Yemen was predominantly Zaydi Shia, alongside Sunni communities; the Gulf coast was mostly Sunni, though Shia merchant and urban communities were also significant, especially in Bahrain and eastern Arabia.

philosophy.zh: 政治与社会思想以伊斯兰法理、部落荣誉、君主忠诚和保守伦理为中心。知识传统更偏向宗教法学、家谱、诗歌与历史记忆，而非现代世俗意识形态。城市精英中开始接触阿拉伯改革主义、泛阿拉伯思想和有限的行政现代化理念。
philosophy.en: Political and social thought centered on Islamic jurisprudence, tribal honor, loyalty to rulers, and conservative moral values. Intellectual life leaned more toward religious scholarship, genealogy, poetry, and historical memory than toward modern secular ideologies. Urban elites were beginning to encounter Arab reformism, pan-Arab thought, and modest ideas of administrative modernization.

writingSystem.zh: 使用阿拉伯文字书写阿拉伯语，行政、宗教、商业和文学记录皆以阿拉伯文为主
writingSystem.en: Arabic script was used to write Arabic, and administrative, religious, commercial, and literary records were overwhelmingly kept in Arabic

culturalAchievements.zh: 半岛在1939年的文化成就主要体现在伊斯兰圣地管理、阿拉伯诗歌传统、部落口述史、宗教教育和港口商业文化的延续。麦加与麦地那作为伊斯兰世界的重要中心具有全球宗教影响力；也门则保有古老山地城市建筑、手抄本传统和法学学术；海湾保持航海、造船、珍珠潜水和跨印度洋商业文化。
culturalAchievements.en: The peninsula's cultural achievements in 1939 lay chiefly in the preservation of Islamic holy places, Arabic poetic traditions, tribal oral history, religious learning, and port-based mercantile culture. Mecca and Medina held global religious significance as major centers of Islam; Yemen preserved ancient highland urban architecture, manuscript traditions, and legal scholarship; the Gulf maintained seafaring, dhow-building, pearl diving, and trans-Indian Ocean commercial culture.

languageFamily.zh: 闪含语系阿拉伯语支，区域内存在内志、汉志、也门和海湾等多种阿拉伯语方言
languageFamily.en: Semitic, specifically the Arabic branch, with regional dialects including Najdi, Hejazi, Yemeni, and Gulf varieties

gdpDescription.zh: 经济总体上仍属低收入、前工业化和区域分割状态。沙特在1938年达曼地区发现商业石油，但1939年仍处于早期开采阶段，尚未彻底改变整体经济结构。朝觐、畜牧、枣椰种植、地方贸易和港口转口仍是沙特主要收入来源。也门经济以高地农业、咖啡、谷物、家畜和红海贸易为主。海湾地区则深受珍珠业崩溃打击，依靠贸易、航运、渔业和英国联系维持。
gdpDescription.en: The economy remained low-income, largely pre-industrial, and regionally fragmented. Commercial oil was discovered in the Dammam area in 1938, but in 1939 petroleum extraction was still in an early phase and had not yet transformed the overall structure. Pilgrimage, pastoralism, date cultivation, local trade, and port transit remained the chief Saudi income sources. Yemen's economy was based on highland agriculture, coffee, grain, livestock, and Red Sea commerce. The Gulf had been badly hit by the collapse of the pearl industry and survived through trade, shipping, fishing, and British connections.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧业、朝觐服务、红海与海湾港口贸易、珍珠采集残余产业、渔业、骆驼运输、手工业、早期石油开采
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, pastoralism, pilgrimage services, Red Sea and Gulf port trade, the remnants of pearling, fishing, camel transport, handicrafts, and early oil extraction

tradeGoods.zh: 枣椰、咖啡、皮革、羊毛、酥油、谷物、盐、鱼产品、珍珠、马匹、香料转口品、纺织品输入品、武器与金属器输入品、少量原油
tradeGoods.en: Dates, coffee, hides, wool, ghee, grain, salt, fish products, pearls, horses, re-exported spices, imported textiles, imported arms and metal goods, and small amounts of crude oil

name.zh: 里亚尔、卢比及多币并用

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异很大。多数乡村与游牧家庭资产主要表现为牲畜、土地使用权、枣园、井水权和家族网络；城市商人则持有库存、船只、珍珠债权、进口货和贵金属。受1930年代经济低迷影响，许多家庭现金短缺。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied greatly. Most rural and nomadic families held wealth in livestock, access to land, date groves, water rights, and kinship networks; urban merchants held inventories, vessels, pearl claims, imported goods, and precious metals. Because of the economic difficulties of the 1930s, many households were cash-poor.

economicSystem.zh: 以传统市场经济、部落交换、港口商业和君主财政征收为基础，夹杂英国帝国贸易网络与少量现代特许开发资本，尤其是沙特东部油田中的美资企业活动
economicSystem.en: The economic system was based on traditional market exchange, tribal barter, port commerce, and monarchical fiscal extraction, interwoven with British imperial trade networks and limited modern concessionary capital, especially American oil-company activity in eastern Saudi Arabia

source.zh: 天课、农业税与部落征收
source.en: Zakat, agricultural taxes, and tribal levies

source.zh: 英国津贴、条约补助与外部款项
source.en: British subsidies, treaty stipends, and external payments

category.zh: 王室、地方津贴与部落安抚
category.en: Royal household, local stipends, and tribal pacification
Debt service, subsidies, and external payments

treasuryDescription.zh: 金库规模有限，且并非单一统一国库，而是由沙特王室财政、也门宫廷财政与各海湾酋长国库存共同构成。流动性常受朝觐收入波动、珍珠市场萎缩和外部补贴变化影响。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was limited and was not a single unified reserve, but rather the combined fiscal holdings of the Saudi royal state, the Yemeni court, and the various Gulf sheikhdoms. Liquidity was often affected by fluctuations in pilgrimage income, the contraction of the pearl market, and changes in external subsidies.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体偏保守，以维持王权、部落忠诚和最低限度行政运作优先，资本建设投入有限。沙特已开始因石油开发前景而调整财政预期，但1939年仍未出现全面资源型财政转型。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was broadly conservative, prioritizing dynastic stability, tribal loyalty, and minimal administrative functioning, with only limited capital investment. Saudi Arabia had begun to revise its expectations because of prospective oil development, but by 1939 no full transition to a resource-based fiscal state had yet occurred.

name.zh: 陆上部队与部族征召军

description.zh: 构成主要军力，包括沙特正规与半正规部队、也门王国部众、以及各地在战时可召集的部落战士。装备以步枪、机枪、少量火炮和骑乘、骆驼机动为主。
description.en: This formed the main military strength, including Saudi regular and semi-regular units, Yemeni royal forces, and tribal fighters who could be mobilized in wartime. Equipment consisted mainly of rifles, machine guns, limited artillery, and horse or camel mobility.

description.zh: 负责首都、宫廷与统治者本人安全，也是政治忠诚度最高的武装力量之一
description.en: These units guarded capitals, courts, and the rulers themselves and were among the most politically reliable armed formations

name.zh: 沿海巡逻与小型海上力量
name.en: Coastal Patrol and Small Naval Forces

description.zh: 以警备船、武装单桅帆船和港口巡逻单位为主，主要用于海岸警戒、缉私和港口治安，真正的现代海军能力很弱
description.en: These consisted mainly of guard boats, armed dhows, and port patrol units used for coastal watch, anti-smuggling duties, and harbor security; true modern naval capability was very weak

name.zh: 宪兵、边防与城市治安部队
name.en: Gendarmerie, Frontier Guards, and Urban Security

description.zh: 负责边界、要道、集市和城市治安，也承担税收保护和地方秩序维护任务
description.en: They controlled frontiers, roads, markets, and urban order, and also protected tax collection and local security

commanderInChief.zh: 阿卜杜勒阿齐兹·伊本·沙特、叶海亚伊玛目及各酋长分别统辖其武装
commanderInChief.en: Abdulaziz Ibn Saud, Imam Yahya, and the various sheikhs each commanded their own armed forces

technology.zh: 军事技术总体处于低到中低水平，以一战后轻武器、少量火炮、有限车辆、骑兵与骆驼机动为主。沙特与也门均缺乏强大的工业基础和现代化空军。个别地区开始接触无线电、电报和现代运输，但战斗力仍高度依赖个人忠诚、部落动员和地形熟悉。
technology.en: Military technology stood at a low to lower-middle level, relying on post-World War I small arms, limited artillery, few vehicles, and horse and camel mobility. Both Saudi Arabia and Yemen lacked a strong industrial base and modern air power. Some areas had begun to use radio, telegraphy, and modern transport, but combat effectiveness still depended heavily on personal loyalty, tribal mobilization, and familiarity with terrain.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自边界争端、部落叛乱、英意在红海与亚丁周边的势力竞争、也门与邻近边境摩擦，以及大战背景下列强海上封锁与外交压力。对海湾酋长国而言，最大安全依托与限制均来自英国。
threats.en: Main threats came from border disputes, tribal unrest, Anglo-Italian rivalry around the Red Sea and Aden, friction between Yemen and neighboring frontiers, and under wartime conditions the possibility of maritime blockade and diplomatic pressure by great powers. For the Gulf sheikhdoms, the greatest security support and constraint alike came from Britain.

populationDescription.zh: 人口大多分布于也门高地、汉志圣城带、阿赫萨绿洲、阿西尔山区以及海湾和红海沿岸港口。内志和鲁卜哈利等广大地区人口稀疏，游牧和半游牧生活方式仍很常见。
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated mainly in the Yemeni highlands, the holy-city belt of the Hejaz, the oases of al-Hasa, the mountains of Asir, and the ports of the Gulf and Red Sea coasts. Much of Najd and the Rub' al-Khali remained sparsely populated, and nomadic or semi-nomadic ways of life were still common.

name.zh: 亚丁湾外缘的巴林麦纳麦

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层可概括为统治王室与酋长家族、宗教学者与赛义德、部落首领、城市商人、中小手工业者、农民、牧民、渔民、珍珠潜水者、奴隶后裔及外来劳工。不同地区的阶级边界往往与部落、宗教血统和城乡身份重叠。
socialClasses.en: Social classes may be summarized as ruling royal and sheikhly families, religious scholars and sayyids, tribal chiefs, urban merchants, small artisans, peasants, pastoralists, fishermen, pearl divers, descendants of slaves, and migrant laborers. In many regions class boundaries overlapped with tribal identity, sacred lineage, and the urban-rural divide.

allies.zh: 总体上与英国保持务实合作，尤其海湾酋长国为英国保护对象；沙特与英国关系谨慎合作；也门则更强调自主，但也在区域平衡中与外部列强周旋
allies.en: Overall the peninsula maintained pragmatic relations with Britain, especially as the Gulf sheikhdoms were British-protected; Saudi Arabia worked with Britain cautiously and pragmatically; Yemen stressed autonomy more strongly but also maneuvered among outside powers in a regional balance

enemies.zh: 无统一明确的总体敌国，但与意大利在红海影响、与周边边界对手及彼此之间存在摩擦；也门与亚丁保护地及沙特边境长期紧张
enemies.en: There was no single unified enemy, but friction existed over Italian influence in the Red Sea, with neighboring border rivals, and among the peninsula's own polities; Yemen remained in long-term tension with the Aden Protectorate and with Saudi frontiers

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以保全王权、维持朝觐与贸易通道、平衡英国影响、避免卷入全面大战并争取财政与军事援助为主。沙特寻求国际承认和边界稳定，也开始因石油特许而与美国商业力量接触；海湾酋长国基本从属于英国海湾体系；也门力求维护独立与宗教君主权威。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on preserving dynastic rule, keeping pilgrimage and trade routes open, balancing British influence, avoiding deep entanglement in general war, and securing fiscal and military assistance. Saudi Arabia sought international recognition and stable frontiers, and had begun to engage American commercial power through oil concessions; the Gulf sheikhdoms largely operated within the British Gulf system; Yemen aimed above all to preserve independence and the authority of its religious monarchy.

era.zh: 第二次世界大战时代早期、晚期前工业向有限现代化过渡阶段
era.en: Early World War Era, a late pre-industrial society in limited transition toward modernization

keyInnovations.zh: 关键变化并非本土工业创新，而是技术引入：无线电通信、机动车运输、有限航空联络、近代港口管理、石油钻探与地质勘测。沙特东部油田的开发是最具历史意义的新技术转折点。
keyInnovations.en: The key changes were less indigenous industrial inventions than technological introductions: radio communications, motor transport, limited air connections, modern port administration, and petroleum drilling and geological surveying. The development of the eastern Saudi oil fields was the most historically significant technological turning point.

strengths.zh: 优势在于伊斯兰圣地带来的宗教中心地位、王室与部落联盟的政治韧性、海湾港口的战略位置、横跨红海与印度洋贸易网络的历史积累，以及沙特新发现石油的巨大潜力。
strengths.en: Its strengths lay in the religious centrality conferred by the Islamic holy places, the political resilience of royal-tribal alliances, the strategic location of Gulf ports, the accumulated legacy of Red Sea and Indian Ocean trade networks, and the enormous potential of newly discovered Saudi oil.

weaknesses.zh: 弱点包括行政碎片化、教育和基础设施薄弱、财政基础狭窄、现代工业缺失、对外部补贴和贸易高度敏感，以及许多地区仍受部落分治、交通困难和边界模糊所制约。
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included administrative fragmentation, weak education and infrastructure, a narrow fiscal base, the absence of modern industry, strong sensitivity to external subsidies and trade conditions, and the continued constraints imposed by tribal segmentation, difficult communications, and poorly defined frontiers.

outlook.zh: 1939年的前景总体稳定但转型在即。短期内，半岛仍将以保守君主制和低度行政整合为特征；中长期看，石油开发、战争时期海运格局变化和英国影响的重新调整将使沙特迅速上升，并逐渐改变整个阿拉伯半岛的经济与外交结构。
outlook.en: The outlook in 1939 was broadly stable but on the verge of transformation. In the short term, the peninsula would remain characterized by conservative monarchies and low administrative integration; in the medium to long term, oil development, wartime changes in shipping patterns, and the reconfiguration of British influence would rapidly elevate Saudi Arabia and gradually reshape the economic and diplomatic structure of the entire Arabian Peninsula.

description.zh: 阿拉伯半岛由新兴沙特王国、也门王国与英国保护下海湾酋长国共同构成。
description.en: The Arabian Peninsula was composed of the emerging Saudi kingdom, the Yemeni kingdom, and British-protected Gulf sheikhdoms.

governmentForm.zh: 名义上的君主立宪制议会王国，但在国防、外交与苏伊士运河事务上受到英国强力干预
governmentForm.en: A nominal constitutional parliamentary kingdom, but under strong British influence in defense, foreign affairs, and matters concerning the Suez Canal

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王室、地主贵族、城市资产阶级、官僚与军官阶层、宗教学者、城市工人以及广大农民构成；农村地主与佃农关系仍深刻影响政治与经济生活
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of the royal family, landed aristocracy, urban bourgeoisie, bureaucratic and officer classes, religious scholars, urban workers, and a large peasantry; relations between rural landlords and tenant farmers continued to shape political and economic life

rulingClass.zh: 王室、宫廷圈层、大地主、上层官僚、自由派政党精英及与英国关系密切的军政人物
rulingClass.en: The royal family, court circles, great landowners, senior bureaucrats, liberal party elites, and military-political figures closely connected to Britain

succession.zh: 穆罕默德·阿里王朝男性世袭，依王室法统继承王位
succession.en: Male hereditary succession within the Muhammad Ali dynasty according to dynastic law

structure.zh: 中央政府以国王、首相、内阁、两院议会与各部组成。1939年埃及拥有正式主权机构，但实际政策常受王宫、华夫脱党、宫廷保守派与英国驻埃高级专员及驻军之间的权力平衡影响
structure.en: The central government consisted of the King, Prime Minister, cabinet, bicameral parliament, and ministries. In 1939 Egypt possessed formal sovereign institutions, but actual policy was often shaped by the balance among the palace, the Wafd Party, conservative court factions, and the British High Commissioner and military presence

function.zh: 负责治安、警察、地方行政监督、集会管理与国内安全
function.en: Responsible for public order, police, oversight of local administration, regulation of assemblies, and internal security

function.zh: 负责预算、税收、国债、海关收入与国家会计
function.en: Responsible for budgeting, taxation, public debt, customs revenue, and state accounting

function.zh: 负责外交代表、条约事务、领事工作与对外谈判，但受英国影响显著
function.en: Responsible for diplomatic representation, treaty affairs, consular work, and foreign negotiations, though heavily constrained by British influence

function.zh: 负责法院体系、法典实施、检察与法律行政
function.en: Responsible for the court system, implementation of codes, prosecution, and legal administration

function.zh: 负责灌溉、水利、堤坝、道路与国家工程，尤其与尼罗河农业密切相关
function.en: Responsible for irrigation, hydraulic works, embankments, roads, and state engineering, especially those tied to Nile agriculture

function.zh: 负责公立学校、课程、教师任用与高等教育发展
function.en: Responsible for public schools, curricula, teacher appointments, and the development of higher education

function.zh: 负责埃及陆军行政、征募、训练与装备，但战略上仍受英军影响
function.en: Responsible for administration, recruitment, training, and equipment of the Egyptian Army, though strategy remained heavily influenced by British forces

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以省和区为核心，由省长、区长及中央任命官员管理；大城市如开罗和亚历山大拥有更复杂的市政机构，但地方自治有限，中央和内政部控制较强
localAdmin.en: Local administration was organized around provinces and districts managed by governors, district officials, and centrally appointed administrators; major cities such as Cairo and Alexandria had more complex municipal institutions, but local autonomy remained limited and central control through the Ministry of Interior was strong

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为混合制，结合法国式民法传统、国家成文法、宗教法院遗绪与领事裁判制度废除后的近代司法框架；个人身份事务中伊斯兰法仍具重要地位
legalSystem.en: The legal system was mixed, combining a French-inspired civil law tradition, state statutory law, remnants of religious jurisdiction, and the modern judicial framework established after the decline of capitulatory courts; Islamic law remained important in personal status matters

taxationSystem.zh: 国家税收以土地税、关税、消费税、印花税与各类间接税为主，棉花出口及关税收入对财政意义重大；税负在农村社会中往往通过地主与地方征收网络传导
taxationSystem.en: State taxation relied chiefly on land taxes, customs duties, excise taxes, stamp taxes, and other indirect levies; cotton exports and customs receipts were especially significant to public finance, while the tax burden in the countryside was often mediated through landlords and local collection networks

religion.zh: 主体宗教为逊尼派伊斯兰教，科普特东正教为最重要的少数宗教传统；宗教生活深刻影响教育、家庭法与公共节庆
religion.en: The majority religion was Sunni Islam, while the Coptic Orthodox Church formed the most important minority religious tradition; religious life deeply influenced education, family law, and public festivals

philosophy.zh: 思想界并存伊斯兰改革主义、阿拉伯民族主义、埃及民族主义、自由宪政主义与保守君主主义；知识分子常讨论现代化、殖民影响、教育改革与民族独立
philosophy.en: Intellectual life combined Islamic reformism, Arab nationalism, Egyptian nationalism, liberal constitutionalism, and conservative monarchism; intellectuals frequently debated modernization, colonial influence, educational reform, and national independence

writingSystem.zh: 官方与主要书写系统为阿拉伯字母书写的阿拉伯语；英语和法语在外交、商业、高等教育及上层社会中也广泛使用
writingSystem.en: The official and principal writing system was Arabic written in the Arabic script; English and French were also widely used in diplomacy, commerce, higher education, and elite society

culturalAchievements.zh: 埃及在阿拉伯世界的新闻出版、戏剧、电影、音乐与大学教育方面居领先地位。开罗与亚历山大是区域性的文化中心，现代阿拉伯文学、报刊与流行音乐在此高度发展
culturalAchievements.en: Egypt stood at the forefront of the Arab world in publishing, theater, film, music, and university education. Cairo and Alexandria served as regional cultural centers where modern Arabic literature, journalism, and popular music flourished

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属亚非语系闪米特语族，为阿拉伯语；日常口语以埃及阿拉伯语方言为主，科普特语主要保留于宗教礼仪
languageFamily.en: The principal language belonged to the Afroasiatic family, Semitic branch, namely Arabic; everyday speech was dominated by Egyptian Arabic, while Coptic survived mainly in liturgical use

gdpDescription.zh: 1939年埃及经济属中等规模的农业出口型经济，以棉花种植和出口为核心，同时拥有铁路、港口、银行、纺织、食品加工及有限的制造业基础。经济对国际棉价、欧洲市场和英国金融影响高度敏感
gdpDescription.en: In 1939 the Egyptian economy was a medium-sized agrarian export economy centered on cotton cultivation and export, while also possessing railways, ports, banks, textiles, food processing, and a limited manufacturing base. It was highly sensitive to world cotton prices, European markets, and British financial influence

mainIndustries.zh: 长绒棉种植、粮食农业、糖业、卷烟、纺织、食品加工、航运服务、港口贸易、铁路运输、建筑与金融
mainIndustries.en: Long-staple cotton cultivation, grain agriculture, sugar, cigarettes, textiles, food processing, shipping services, port trade, rail transport, construction, and finance

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以原棉、棉纱、洋葱、大米、糖与部分农产品为主；进口以机械、车辆、纺织品、煤炭、石油制品、钢材、化学品与制成品为主
tradeGoods.en: Exports were led by raw cotton, cotton yarn, onions, rice, sugar, and other agricultural produce; imports consisted mainly of machinery, vehicles, textiles, coal, petroleum products, steel, chemicals, and manufactured goods

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差距极大。少数大地主、商人和金融精英拥有大量土地与资本；城市中产阶层有限；广大农村家庭资产薄弱，依赖租地、季节性劳作与家族网络维持生计
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. A small group of great landowners, merchants, and financial elites held substantial land and capital; the urban middle class remained limited; and the vast rural majority possessed few assets and relied on tenancy, seasonal labor, and family networks for subsistence

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济和私有土地制度为基础，但国家在灌溉、铁路、关税、金融监管及对外贸易框架中具有重要作用；经济结构深受半殖民依附和英国资本影响
economicSystem.en: The system was based on a market economy and private landownership, but the state played an important role in irrigation, railways, customs, financial regulation, and the framework of foreign trade; the structure remained deeply shaped by semi-colonial dependence and British capital

source.zh: 土地税与农业相关税收
国有企业、铁路与行政收费
source.en: State enterprises, railways, and administrative fees

source.zh: 印花税、司法收费及其他
source.en: Stamp duties, judicial fees, and other sources

category.zh: 教育、公共卫生与社会服务
category.en: Education, public health, and social services
Transport, postal services, and railway support

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况总体稳健，但高度依赖棉花出口、海关和金融稳定。英国的货币与战略影响使埃及在战前财政上具一定缓冲能力，但主权运用并不完全自主
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was generally sound, but heavily dependent on cotton exports, customs, and financial stability. British monetary and strategic influence gave Egypt some fiscal cushioning on the eve of war, though the state did not exercise fully autonomous control

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向谨慎平衡预算，重视维持信用、控制债务、保障灌溉与交通投资，同时避免因政治动荡或国际市场波动而引发财政危机
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy tended toward cautious budget balancing, emphasizing creditworthiness, debt control, and investment in irrigation and transport while trying to avoid fiscal crisis caused by political instability or fluctuations in international markets

description.zh: 以步兵、骑兵残余编制、炮兵和工兵为核心，主要承担国内防务、治安支持与有限边境任务；训练和装备在地区内属中等水平，但在现代机械化和重火力方面明显落后于欧洲列强
description.en: Centered on infantry, residual cavalry formations, artillery, and engineers, it primarily handled domestic defense, support for internal security, and limited frontier duties; training and equipment were moderate by regional standards, but clearly behind the European powers in mechanization and heavy firepower

description.zh: 规模较小，拥有侦察、联络与有限战斗机力量，主要执行侦察、训练和国内防卫任务，对英国皇家空军依赖明显
description.en: Small in scale, with reconnaissance, liaison, and limited fighter capacity, it mainly performed reconnaissance, training, and homeland defense roles and remained strongly dependent on the Royal Air Force

description.zh: 埃及海军力量极其有限，主要负责港口警备、海岸巡逻与河道安全，无法独立保卫地中海和红海海上通道
description.en: Egyptian naval strength was extremely limited, serving mainly for harbor guard, coastal patrol, and river security, and was incapable of independently protecting Mediterranean and Red Sea sea lanes

description.zh: 负责地方秩序、乡村治安、设施警卫与动员辅助，在国家控制乡村和交通线方面作用重要
description.en: Responsible for local order, rural policing, infrastructure security, and mobilization support, they were important in maintaining state control over the countryside and communications lines

commanderInChief.zh: 国王法鲁克一世为名义上的最高统帅，实际军事指挥由战争部与高级军官团执行，并受英国中东司令部重大影响
commanderInChief.en: King Farouk I was the nominal commander-in-chief, while actual military direction was carried out by the Ministry of War and senior officer corps under major influence from British Middle East Command

technology.zh: 武器技术处于两次大战之间水平，装备以步枪、机枪、轻炮、少量装甲车辆和有限航空兵器为主。通信、机械化、现代防空和重炮体系不足，关键防务依赖英军驻埃力量
technology.en: Weapons technology stood at an interwar level, relying on rifles, machine guns, light artillery, a small number of armored vehicles, and limited air assets. Communications, mechanization, modern air defense, and heavy artillery were inadequate, and key defense functions depended on British forces stationed in Egypt

threats.zh: 主要外部威胁来自意大利在利比亚和东非的军事存在，以及大战爆发后地中海战局对苏伊士运河的威胁；内部则需防范民族主义抗议、政治不稳及战时安全压力
threats.en: The main external threat came from the Italian military presence in Libya and East Africa, as well as the danger posed to the Suez Canal by wartime developments in the Mediterranean; internally, the state also faced nationalist protests, political instability, and wartime security pressures

populationDescription.zh: 人口高度集中于尼罗河三角洲与河谷地带，绝大多数居民生活在农业村庄。人口增长较快，城乡差距显著，开罗和亚历山大是主要都市中心
populationDescription.en: The population was heavily concentrated in the Nile Delta and Valley, with the overwhelming majority living in agricultural villages. Population growth was relatively rapid, rural-urban disparities were marked, and Cairo and Alexandria were the principal metropolitan centers

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大致分为王室与贵族、大土地所有者、城市商人和专业中产、国家官僚与军官、工人阶层、小农与佃农、无地农业劳工，以及科普特、黎凡特与欧洲侨民等少数社群
socialClasses.en: Social classes broadly included the royal family and aristocracy, large landowners, urban merchants and professional middle classes, state bureaucrats and officers, the working class, smallholders and tenant peasants, landless agricultural laborers, and minority communities such as Copts, Levantines, and Europeans

allies.zh: 名义上保持独立，但实际上与英国及英联邦阵营关系最为紧密；与阿拉伯邻国如伊拉克、外约旦和沙特阿拉伯维持区域性联系
allies.en: Nominally independent, but in practice most closely aligned with Britain and the wider British bloc; it also maintained regional ties with Arab neighbors such as Iraq, Transjordan, and Saudi Arabia

enemies.zh: 1939年尚未全面参战，但将意大利法西斯政权视为直接战略威胁；轴心国在地中海与北非的扩张均危及埃及安全
enemies.en: Though not yet fully belligerent in 1939, Egypt regarded Fascist Italy as the immediate strategic threat; Axis expansion in the Mediterranean and North Africa endangered Egyptian security

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策核心是维护形式独立、减少英国控制、保障王国稳定并避免直接卷入大战，同时依靠英国力量保卫苏伊士与西部边境。这种政策体现出主权追求与现实依附并存的特征
foreignPolicy.en: The core of foreign policy was to preserve formal independence, reduce British control, maintain the stability of the kingdom, and avoid direct entanglement in the war while still relying on British power to protect the Suez Canal and the western frontier. This reflected the coexistence of aspirations for sovereignty and practical dependence

keyInnovations.zh: 关键现代技术包括铁路网、现代灌溉体系、电报与电话、港口设施、民用与军用航空起步、城市电力和近代大学教育。技术应用集中于国家行政、棉花经济、交通运输和大城市服务业
keyInnovations.en: Key modern technologies included the railway network, modern irrigation systems, telegraph and telephone communications, port facilities, nascent civil and military aviation, urban electricity, and modern university education. Technological application was concentrated in state administration, the cotton economy, transport, and metropolitan services

strengths.zh: 埃及拥有尼罗河农业基础、苏伊士运河的战略位置、阿拉伯世界领先的文化影响力、相对成熟的国家机构以及比多数周边地区更发达的交通和金融体系
strengths.en: Egypt possessed the agricultural base of the Nile, the strategic position of the Suez Canal, leading cultural influence in the Arab world, relatively mature state institutions, and transport and financial systems more developed than those of many neighboring regions

weaknesses.zh: 国家主权受英国严重限制，经济过度依赖棉花，土地占有极端不均，工业化程度不足，军力有限且依赖英军，王室、政党与英国之间的政治斗争削弱了治理能力
weaknesses.en: State sovereignty was severely constrained by Britain, the economy was overly dependent on cotton, landholding was extremely unequal, industrialization was insufficient, military power was limited and reliant on British forces, and political struggles among the palace, parties, and Britain weakened governance

outlook.zh: 短期内王国总体稳定，但第二次世界大战将使埃及的战略地位急剧上升，也会加剧英国驻军、经济动员、民族主义政治和王权合法性之间的矛盾。未来数年埃及可能在名义独立与实际受控之间承受更大压力
outlook.en: In the short term the kingdom remained broadly stable, but the Second World War would sharply elevate Egypt’s strategic importance and intensify tensions among the British military presence, wartime economic mobilization, nationalist politics, and the legitimacy of the monarchy. In the coming years Egypt was likely to face greater strain between nominal independence and effective external control

description.zh: 埃及形式独立但仍受英国军事与外交影响。
description.en: Egypt was formally independent but remained under strong British military and diplomatic influence.

name.en: European Colonial Administrations of East Africa

ruler.zh: 英国、法国与意大利殖民总督及专员
ruler.en: British, French, and Italian colonial governors and commissioners

rulerTitle.zh: 总督、总督代理、专员与殖民行政长官
rulerTitle.en: Governors, acting governors, commissioners, and colonial administrators

capital.zh: 内罗毕、吉布提、摩加迪沙与阿斯马拉

governmentForm.zh: 由英国、法国与意大利分别直接统治的殖民行政体制，包含保护地、殖民地与总督辖区
governmentForm.en: A set of directly ruled colonial administrations under Britain, France, and Italy, including protectorates, colonies, and governorates

socialStructure.zh: 社会呈明显殖民等级秩序：欧洲官员与侨民居上层，其次为受殖民政权扶植的地方酋长、商人和文书阶层，广大非洲与索马里、厄立特里亚、肯尼亚、坦噶尼喀及周边本地居民构成劳动与农业主体
socialStructure.en: Society was organized in a marked colonial hierarchy: European officials and settlers at the top, followed by colonial-backed chiefs, merchants, and clerical intermediaries, while the great majority of African, Somali, Eritrean, Kenyan, Tanganyikan, and related local peoples formed the main agricultural and laboring population

rulingClass.zh: 欧洲殖民官僚、驻军军官、定居者精英以及受官方承认的地方酋长与协作性上层人物
rulingClass.en: European colonial bureaucrats, military officers, settler elites, and officially recognized local chiefs and collaborating notables

succession.zh: 行政长官由宗主国政府任命，按殖民部、海军部或法西斯党国体系的人事决定更替，并非本地世袭
succession.en: Administrators were appointed by the metropolitan governments and replaced through decisions of colonial offices, naval ministries, or the Fascist party-state apparatus rather than by local hereditary succession

structure.zh: 英国东非以殖民地总督、保护地专员和间接统治制度为核心；法属索马里由总督及法属殖民官僚体系管辖；意属东非余部则由总督、驻军、法西斯党组织与殖民省级机构实施集中统治
structure.en: British East Africa was centered on governors, commissioners, and indirect rule; French Somaliland was administered through a governor and the French colonial bureaucracy; the remaining Italian East African territories were governed through a viceroy-governor structure, military authorities, Fascist party organs, and centralized colonial provincial institutions

function.zh: 统筹总督命令、殖民法规、人事任命、跨地区协调及对宗主国的呈报
function.en: Coordinated gubernatorial orders, colonial regulations, appointments, inter-territorial coordination, and reporting to the metropolitan governments

function.zh: 征收关税、人头税、地税、消费税和港口费用，编制预算并管理殖民收入
function.en: Collected customs, hut or poll taxes, land taxes, excise duties, and port fees, prepared budgets, and managed colonial revenue

name.zh: 土著事务与地方行政局
name.en: Native Affairs and Local Administration Department

function.zh: 监督酋长、部族法庭、保留地、劳役征发、人口登记和地方秩序
function.en: Supervised chiefs, tribal courts, reserves, labor levies, population registration, and local order

function.zh: 负责铁路、公路、港口、电报、供水及政府建筑建设维护
function.en: Handled the construction and maintenance of railways, roads, ports, telegraphs, water systems, and government buildings

function.zh: 维持殖民治安、运营监狱、执行刑法与特别条例，并管理地方法院和上诉制度
function.en: Maintained colonial order, operated prisons, enforced criminal law and special ordinances, and managed local courts and appeals

function.zh: 推动出口作物生产、兽疫防治、基础医疗、防疫与农村技术推广
function.en: Promoted export crop production, controlled animal disease, provided basic medical services, managed epidemic prevention, and supported rural extension work

localAdmin.zh: 基层治理高度依赖酋长、部族首领、阿斯卡里军警指挥官和受训文书。英属地区较多实行间接统治，法属索马里依托港口都市官僚体系，意属地区则强调警察、军政与法西斯组织的直接控制
localAdmin.en: Local administration relied heavily on chiefs, tribal headmen, askari commanders, and trained clerks. British territories used indirect rule more extensively, French Somaliland relied on an urban port-based bureaucracy, and Italian territories emphasized direct control through police, military administration, and Fascist organizations

legalSystem.zh: 法律制度呈复合形态：欧洲殖民法、行政命令、特别治安条例与有限承认的习惯法并存。欧洲人和本地居民常适用不同程序，政治案件与劳工案件往往偏向殖民国家利益
legalSystem.en: The legal system was mixed: European colonial law, administrative decrees, special security regulations, and selectively recognized customary law coexisted. Europeans and local subjects were often treated under different procedures, and political or labor cases tended to favor colonial state interests

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以关税、进口税、铁路与港口收费、人头税、牲畜税、土地租金和种植园相关税收为核心。税制兼具筹资与强迫本地居民进入货币经济和劳工市场的作用
taxationSystem.en: Taxation centered on customs duties, import levies, railway and port fees, poll taxes, livestock taxes, land rents, and plantation-related revenues. The tax system served both fiscal purposes and the coercive incorporation of local populations into the money economy and labor market

religion.zh: 宗教格局极为多元，包括伊斯兰教、东正教与东方基督教传统、天主教与新教传教体系，以及本土信仰。殖民政权通常利用宗教机构进行教育、医疗和社会控制
religion.en: The religious landscape was highly diverse, including Islam, Orthodox and Eastern Christian traditions, Catholic and Protestant missionary systems, and indigenous beliefs. Colonial regimes often used religious institutions for education, medical work, and social control

philosophy.zh: 主导意识形态并非本土哲学统一体，而是欧洲帝国主义、殖民“文明使命”、种族等级观念和法西斯殖民理论；同时本地社会仍保留伊斯兰法学、长老政治和传统伦理秩序
philosophy.en: The dominant ideological framework was not a unified indigenous philosophy but European imperialism, the colonial 'civilizing mission,' racial hierarchy, and Fascist colonial doctrine; at the same time, local societies retained Islamic jurisprudence, elder authority, and traditional ethical orders

writingSystem.zh: 行政书写主要使用英语、法语和意大利语，辅以阿拉伯字母索马里文书写传统、阿姆哈拉与提格里尼亚使用的吉兹系文字，以及斯瓦希里和多种地方语言的拉丁化书写
writingSystem.en: Administrative writing chiefly used English, French, and Italian, alongside Somali writing traditions in Arabic script, the Ge'ez-derived scripts used for Amharic and Tigrinya, and Latinized writing for Swahili and various local languages

culturalAchievements.zh: 1939年的文化成就主要体现在港口城市文化交汇、铁路沿线新型殖民城市形成、学校教育网络、教会印刷、行政测绘和民族志研究，而非本地自主国家赞助的统一文化工程
culturalAchievements.en: Cultural achievements in 1939 lay mainly in port-city cosmopolitan exchange, the growth of new colonial railway towns, expanding school networks, mission printing, administrative mapping, and ethnographic study rather than a unified cultural program sponsored by an indigenous state

languageFamily.zh: 语言分布复杂，包含班图语族、库施特语族、尼罗-撒哈拉语系、闪含语系分支以及欧洲印欧语言；斯瓦希里语在东非贸易与基层行政中具有跨族群通用地位
languageFamily.en: The linguistic landscape was complex, including Bantu, Cushitic, Nilo-Saharan, and Afroasiatic branches as well as European Indo-European languages; Swahili held important cross-ethnic status in trade and lower-level administration across East Africa

gdpDescription.zh: 经济总体以低收入殖民型初级产品经济为主，铁路、港口和少量工业设施服务于出口与军事运输。英属地区经济规模较大，法属索马里依赖港口与转口，意属地区则因战争开支和殖民建设而带有较强军事化色彩
gdpDescription.en: The economy was predominantly a low-income colonial primary-export economy, with railways, ports, and limited industrial facilities serving export and military transport. The British territories held the largest economic weight, French Somaliland depended on port and transit activity, and the Italian territories carried a strong militarized character because of war spending and colonial construction

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧业、咖啡、茶叶、剑麻、棉花、皮革、港口装卸、铁路运输、基础食品加工、盐业、渔业与军需后勤
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, pastoralism, coffee, tea, sisal, cotton, leather, port handling, railway transport, basic food processing, salt, fishing, and military logistics

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以咖啡、茶叶、皮张、牲畜、棉花、剑麻、蜂蜡和部分矿产品为主，进口则包括纺织品、机械、金属制品、燃料、药品与行政军需物资
tradeGoods.en: Exports consisted chiefly of coffee, tea, hides, livestock, cotton, sisal, beeswax, and some minerals, while imports included textiles, machinery, metal goods, fuel, medicines, and administrative and military supplies

name.zh: 东非先令、法郎与意大利里拉并行
name.en: East African shilling, franc, and Italian lira in parallel circulation

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大。欧洲定居者、商人和高等文官拥有土地、商号和固定薪金；多数本地家庭财富主要体现为牲畜、耕地使用权、谷物储备和亲属网络，现金储蓄有限
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. European settlers, merchants, and senior officials held land, firms, and salaried posts; most local households stored wealth chiefly in livestock, cultivation rights, grain stocks, and kinship networks, with limited cash savings

economicSystem.zh: 殖民指向型混合经济，以出口作物、港口贸易和行政强制为核心，私营欧洲资本、特许公司、定居者农场及国家主导基础设施并存
economicSystem.en: A colonial-oriented mixed economy centered on export crops, port trade, and administrative coercion, combining private European capital, chartered firms, settler farms, and state-led infrastructure

source.zh: 人头税、牲畜税与地方直接税
source.en: Poll taxes, livestock taxes, and local direct taxation

source.zh: 土地租金、特许权与种植园收入
source.en: Land rents, concessions, and plantation income

source.zh: 宗主国补助与特别拨款

category.zh: 卫生、教育与传教协作项目
农业开发与定居殖民补贴

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政储备分散存在各殖民地金库、货币局准备金、港口周转金和宗主国账户中，实际可自由支配程度受战争、海运与宗主国财政需求影响较大
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves were dispersed across colonial treasuries, currency-board reserves, port working funds, and metropolitan accounts, and the extent of freely available cash was heavily influenced by war, shipping, and metropolitan fiscal demands

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策重在维持秩序、保障出口运输和压低本地社会开支，遇到军事压力时则通过宗主国拨款、借款和特别征收填补缺口
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized order, export transport, and low social expenditure on the local population, while military pressure was met through metropolitan transfers, borrowing, and special levies

name.zh: 殖民陆军与本地辅助部队
name.en: Colonial Army and Indigenous Auxiliary Forces

description.zh: 包括英国国王非洲步枪队、法属索马里驻军、意大利殖民军、阿斯卡里部队及地方征募步兵，是主要军事力量
description.en: Included the King's African Rifles, the garrison of French Somaliland, Italian colonial troops, askari formations, and locally recruited infantry, forming the principal military arm

name.zh: 殖民警察、宪兵与边防队
name.en: Colonial Police, Gendarmerie, and Frontier Guards

description.zh: 负责港口、铁路、城镇和边境巡逻，也执行情报、镇压和劳工控制任务
description.en: Handled patrols in ports, railways, towns, and border zones, while also carrying out intelligence, repression, and labor-control duties

description.zh: 规模有限，主要由宗主国舰艇、港口炮台、海军陆战队分遣队和补给设施构成，重点防护红海与印度洋沿岸航线
description.en: Limited in scale, composed mainly of metropolitan naval vessels, port batteries, marine detachments, and supply facilities, with emphasis on Red Sea and Indian Ocean sea-lane defense

name.en: Air Forces and Aviation Support Units

description.zh: 包括英国、法国和意大利在当地部署的侦察、运输、联络和有限轰炸力量，机场网络多服务于军事与殖民联络
description.en: Included British, French, and Italian reconnaissance, transport, liaison, and limited bombing forces deployed locally, with airfields serving military and colonial communications

commanderInChief.zh: 各殖民地总督、驻军总司令及宗主国东非战区指挥官分掌军政
commanderInChief.en: Authority was divided among colonial governors, local military commanders, and metropolitan East African theater commanders

technology.zh: 军事技术处于两次大战之间后期水平，拥有步枪、机枪、山炮、装甲车、无线电、电报、军用卡车和轻型飞机；英法据点补给较稳，意属东非则在海上封锁风险下更依赖既有库存
technology.en: Military technology stood at a late interwar level, with rifles, machine guns, mountain artillery, armored cars, radios, telegraphy, military trucks, and light aircraft; British and French positions had steadier supply, while Italian East Africa relied more heavily on accumulated stocks under the risk of maritime blockade

threats.zh: 主要威胁包括即将扩大的第二次世界大战、红海与印度洋航线争夺、殖民地边境摩擦、意英法之间的东非战略对峙，以及本地反殖民不满与游击抵抗的潜在上升
threats.en: Main threats included the widening Second World War, competition over Red Sea and Indian Ocean routes, colonial frontier tensions, strategic confrontation among Italy, Britain, and France in East Africa, and the possible growth of local anti-colonial unrest and guerrilla resistance

populationDescription.zh: 人口极为多样，分布于肯尼亚、乌干达、坦噶尼喀、桑给巴尔相关区、法属索马里及意属索马里和厄立特里亚等地。绝大多数为农村居民，欧洲人口比例很低但掌握政治与经济优势
populationDescription.en: The population was highly diverse and spread across Kenya, Uganda, Tanganyika, associated Zanzibar-linked zones, French Somaliland, and Italian Somaliland and Eritrea. The overwhelming majority lived in rural areas, while Europeans formed a small minority but held political and economic dominance

socialClasses.zh: 主要分为欧洲行政与定居精英、亚非商人中间层、教会与学校培养的本地文书及教师阶层、受承认酋长与地主、城市工人、契约与季节劳工、农民与牧民。种族与法律地位常比财富更决定社会机会
socialClasses.en: Main strata included European administrative and settler elites, Asian and African merchant intermediaries, locally trained clerks and teachers from mission or school systems, recognized chiefs and landlords, urban workers, contract and seasonal laborers, and peasants and pastoralists. Race and legal status often shaped opportunity more strongly than wealth alone

allies.zh: 其对外关系实质上从属于英国、法国与意大利本国；英属地区与大英帝国体系协调，法属索马里与法国本土及法属殖民网络相连，意属地区则附属于法西斯意大利及其殖民战略
allies.en: Their external relations were effectively subordinate to Britain, France, and Italy; British territories aligned with the wider British imperial system, French Somaliland with metropolitan France and the French colonial network, and the Italian territories with Fascist Italy and its colonial strategy

enemies.zh: 1939年时敌对关系主要由宗主国决定。英法殖民地警惕意大利扩张与战争风险；意属东非则将英法在红海与印度洋的海上优势视为主要威胁
enemies.en: In 1939, hostile relations were determined mainly by the metropolitan powers. British and French colonies watched Italian expansion and the risk of war, while Italian East Africa regarded British and French naval superiority in the Red Sea and Indian Ocean as the principal threat

foreignPolicy.zh: 并无独立外交，核心目标是维护帝国海路、边界安全、对外贸易与殖民秩序。各地港口和铁路在大战前夕被纳入更广泛的帝国战略部署
foreignPolicy.en: There was no independent foreign policy; the central objectives were to maintain imperial sea routes, border security, external trade, and colonial order. Ports and railways across the region were increasingly integrated into wider imperial strategic planning on the eve of world war

era.zh: 世界大战时代前夕的晚期殖民工业与交通时代
era.en: Late colonial industrial and transport age on the eve of the World War Era

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术并非本地原创，而是殖民输入：铁路网、蒸汽与柴油港务设施、电报与无线电、机动车运输、基础航空站、现代测绘、卫生防疫体系、机械化农业设备和小型发电设施
keyInnovations.en: Key innovations were not primarily local inventions but colonial imports: railway networks, steam and diesel port equipment, telegraphy and radio, motor transport, basic airfields, modern surveying, public-health and anti-epidemic systems, mechanized agricultural equipment, and small-scale electric generation

strengths.zh: 该区域拥有重要海港、红海与印度洋交通位置、可扩展的农业腹地、既有铁路网络与帝国资源支持。英国和法国据点在海上联系与后续动员方面具有明显优势
strengths.en: The region possessed important ports, strategic Red Sea and Indian Ocean positioning, expandable agricultural hinterlands, existing railway networks, and access to imperial resources. British and French positions held clear advantages in maritime connection and follow-on mobilization

weaknesses.zh: 根本弱点在于殖民统治合法性不足、基础教育与医疗覆盖有限、经济单一依赖出口、种族不平等严重、城乡差距大，且意属地区面临被封锁与补给困难的结构性脆弱性
weaknesses.en: Its fundamental weaknesses lay in the weak legitimacy of colonial rule, limited education and health coverage, dependence on narrow export sectors, severe racial inequality, wide urban-rural disparities, and the structural vulnerability of the Italian territories to blockade and supply shortages

outlook.zh: 1939年的表面稳定很可能被欧洲大战迅速打破。短期内殖民政权仍能依靠军警与帝国交通维持控制，但中长期战争压力、资源征发和民族政治觉醒将削弱欧洲对东非的统治基础
outlook.en: The apparent stability of 1939 was likely to be quickly disrupted by the European war. In the short term colonial regimes could still maintain control through police, military force, and imperial transport, but in the medium to long term wartime strain, resource extraction, and rising nationalist politics would erode the foundations of European rule in East Africa

description.zh: 东非在1939年大部分由欧洲殖民帝国直接统治。
description.en: Most of East Africa in 1939 was directly ruled by European colonial empires.

name.zh: 意属东非中的埃塞俄比亚
意大利占领下的埃塞俄比亚帝国

ruler.zh: 维托里奥·埃马努埃莱三世与阿梅代奥亲王
ruler.en: Victor Emmanuel III and Prince Amedeo

rulerTitle.zh: 埃塞俄比亚皇帝与意属东非总督兼副王
rulerTitle.en: Emperor of Ethiopia and Viceroy-Governor General of Italian East Africa

governmentForm.zh: 法西斯意大利殖民统治下的名义并入型帝国领地，隶属于意属东非总督辖区
governmentForm.en: A fascist colonial administration under nominal imperial incorporation, governed as part of Italian East Africa

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构在意大利征服后发生剧烈重组：顶层为意大利殖民官员、驻军与定居者；其下为与殖民政权合作的部分地方酋长、行政中介与城市雇员；广大主体仍为埃塞俄比亚农民、牧民、教士与地方贵族残余。传统皇室与贵族体系遭到打击，但在乡村和山区仍保持影响力，并与抗意武装相联系。
socialStructure.en: The social order was violently restructured after the Italian conquest: at the top stood Italian colonial officials, garrison troops, and settlers; beneath them were selected collaborating local chiefs, administrative intermediaries, and urban employees; the overwhelming majority remained Ethiopian peasants, pastoralists, clergy, and remnants of the provincial nobility. The traditional imperial aristocracy was suppressed, yet retained influence in rural and highland regions and was often linked to anti-Italian resistance.

rulingClass.zh: 意大利法西斯殖民官僚、军方指挥层、定居殖民者，以及受其扶植的地方协力精英
rulingClass.en: Italian fascist colonial bureaucrats, military commanders, settler elites, and selected local collaborators

succession.zh: 名义上遵循萨伏依王朝在意大利王国的世袭继承；但埃塞俄比亚实际治理权由罗马任命的总督兼副王掌握，不存在本地自主继承机制
succession.en: Nominally hereditary through the House of Savoy as in the Kingdom of Italy; in practice, authority in Ethiopia was exercised by the Rome-appointed Viceroy-Governor General, with no autonomous local succession mechanism

structure.zh: 1939年的埃塞俄比亚并非独立国家机关，而是意属东非的一部分，由总督兼副王自亚的斯亚贝巴统辖，并受罗马殖民部、外交部、军方与法西斯党体系共同影响。行政上分层为总督府、总督辖下秘书与技术部门、省级行政区、区与地方酋长体系，同时以军警力量维持秩序。
structure.en: In 1939 Ethiopia did not possess an independent state apparatus, but formed part of Italian East Africa under the Viceroy-Governor General in Addis Ababa, subject to the influence of Rome's colonial ministry, foreign ministry, military, and Fascist Party structures. Administration was layered through the viceroyal palace, secretarial and technical departments, provincial administrations, district offices, and systems of local chiefs, while military and police forces underpinned order.

function.zh: 负责总督政令起草、行政协调、档案、对罗马的往来报告以及殖民地内部命令传达
function.en: Handled drafting of viceregal decrees, administrative coordination, archives, reporting to Rome, and transmission of orders within the colony

name.en: Department of Interior and Native Affairs

function.zh: 管理地方行政、户籍、部族与酋长事务、治安监督及对被征服地区的政治控制
function.en: Oversaw local administration, registration, tribal and chieftain affairs, public order supervision, and political control of conquered areas

name.zh: 公共工程与殖民开发局
name.en: Department of Public Works and Colonial Development

function.zh: 负责道路、桥梁、驻地、通信设施、城市规划、欧洲人定居区建设及基础开发项目
function.en: Managed roads, bridges, garrisons, communications facilities, town planning, settler districts, and basic development projects

function.zh: 征收关税、人头税、商业税及其他殖民收入，编制预算并监督支付与审计
function.en: Collected customs duties, poll taxes, commercial taxes, and other colonial revenues, prepared budgets, and supervised payments and audits

name.en: Department of Police and Colonial Security

function.zh: 负责城市警察、政治侦察、反叛乱、监禁设施和对抵抗组织的监视与镇压
function.en: Directed urban policing, political intelligence, counterinsurgency, detention facilities, and surveillance and repression of resistance networks

name.en: Department of Agriculture, Livestock, and Commerce

function.zh: 管理农业统计、土地开发、特许种植、畜产控制及殖民地内外贸易事务
function.en: Supervised agricultural statistics, land development, concessionary cultivation, livestock regulation, and internal and external trade affairs

name.en: Department of Justice and Legal Affairs

function.zh: 执行殖民法令、管理特别法庭与行政处罚，并协调意大利法与土著惯例的有限适用
function.en: Implemented colonial decrees, administered special courts and administrative penalties, and coordinated the limited application of Italian law and indigenous custom

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由省、区、驻地和经挑选的地方首领共同构成。城市与交通干线沿线由意大利官员直接控制更强，广大乡村和山区则依赖间接统治、军事扫荡与临时妥协并行。行政覆盖极不均衡，许多地区在名义统治之外仍由抗意力量或地方势力实际支配。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was composed of provinces, districts, garrison posts, and selected local chiefs. Italian officials exercised stronger direct control in cities and along transport routes, while vast rural and highland areas were managed through a mix of indirect rule, military sweeps, and temporary compromise. Administrative penetration was highly uneven, and many areas beyond formal control remained effectively dominated by resistance forces or local powerholders.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以意大利殖民法、总督敕令、军事戒严措施和种族隔离性规章为主。涉及欧洲人、殖民官员和重大政治案件时通常适用意大利法或特别法庭；涉及本地民事与部族事务时则有限承认习惯法。镇压反抗时大量依赖军事法令、集体惩罚和非常措施。
legalSystem.en: The legal system rested on Italian colonial law, viceregal decrees, martial measures, and racially discriminatory regulations. Cases involving Europeans, colonial officials, and major political offenses generally fell under Italian law or special tribunals; local civil and tribal matters saw limited recognition of customary law. Suppression of resistance relied extensively on military decrees, collective punishment, and emergency measures.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要包括关税、人头税、市场税、牲畜税、许可证费和商业征税；此外还存在以劳役、征用、运输义务和实物征收形式出现的准财政负担。税制服务于殖民驻军与基础设施建设，对农村居民而言负担沉重且执行方式常伴随强制。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation centered on customs duties, poll taxes, market dues, livestock taxes, license fees, and commercial levies; in addition, quasi-fiscal burdens appeared through labor obligations, requisitions, transport duties, and payments in kind. The system was designed to support the colonial garrison and infrastructure building, and for rural inhabitants it was heavy and often coercively enforced.

religion.zh: 埃塞俄比亚社会仍以埃塞俄比亚正教为核心宗教传统，伊斯兰教在东部、南部和若干商贸地区亦极为重要；此外存在天主教传教活动及地方信仰。殖民当局试图削弱正教会作为民族抵抗中心的地位，但未能根本改变宗教格局。
religion.en: Ethiopian society remained centered on the Ethiopian Orthodox tradition, while Islam was highly significant in eastern, southern, and several commercial regions; Catholic missions and local beliefs were also present. The colonial authorities sought to weaken the Orthodox Church as a focus of national resistance, but failed to fundamentally alter the religious landscape.

philosophy.zh: 思想传统以埃塞俄比亚基督教王权观、教会学术传统、地方习惯法伦理与反殖民民族意识为主。1939年的文化生活深受流亡皇室、教士网络和爱国抵抗思想影响，同时也受到意大利法西斯宣传和殖民现代化话语的强烈压迫。
philosophy.en: The dominant intellectual traditions combined Ethiopian Christian ideas of kingship, ecclesiastical scholarship, customary legal ethics, and anti-colonial patriotism. Cultural life in 1939 was deeply shaped by the influence of the exiled imperial court, clerical networks, and patriotic resistance, while also being heavily pressured by Italian Fascist propaganda and colonial-modernizing rhetoric.

writingSystem.zh: 主要书写系统为吉兹字母，用于阿姆哈拉语及宗教文本；阿拉伯字母在部分穆斯林社群中使用；意大利语拉丁字母则用于殖民行政、军务和商业记录。
writingSystem.en: The principal script was Ge'ez, used for Amharic and religious texts; Arabic script was employed in some Muslim communities; the Latin alphabet in Italian was used for colonial administration, military business, and commercial records.

culturalAchievements.zh: 尽管处于占领与战争状态，埃塞俄比亚仍保有深厚的教会手抄本、圣乐、壁画、石刻教堂传统、宫廷史学与口传史诗文化。1930年代末的突出文化特征并非新成就，而是传统文化在殖民压迫下的保存、流散与作为民族认同象征的再强化。
culturalAchievements.en: Despite occupation and war, Ethiopia retained profound traditions of ecclesiastical manuscripts, sacred music, mural art, rock-hewn church heritage, court historiography, and oral epic culture. The most striking cultural feature of the late 1930s was not new achievement but the preservation, displacement, and intensified symbolic role of traditional culture under colonial oppression.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属于亚非语系，包括闪米特语支的阿姆哈拉语与提格里尼亚语、库施特语支的奥罗莫语与索马里语等；殖民统治层使用意大利语
languageFamily.en: The main languages belonged to the Afroasiatic family, including Semitic languages such as Amharic and Tigrinya and Cushitic languages such as Oromo and Somali; the colonial ruling layer used Italian

gdpDescription.zh: 经济总体仍为低收入农业社会，受1935至1936年战争破坏、1937年后大规模镇压、交通瓶颈和持续抵抗影响严重。意大利修筑道路和推进若干城市工程，带来有限的殖民型投资，但这些投入主要服务军事控制与定居开发，而非本地普遍繁荣。
gdpDescription.en: The economy remained that of a low-income agrarian society, severely damaged by the 1935-1936 war, the massive repression after 1937, transport bottlenecks, and ongoing resistance. Italian road building and urban works brought some colonial investment, but these efforts primarily served military control and settler development rather than broad local prosperity.

mainIndustries.zh: 自给农业、谷物种植、畜牧业、咖啡生产、皮革与兽产品、小规模手工业、运输与军需建设、城市建筑业
mainIndustries.en: Subsistence agriculture, grain cultivation, livestock raising, coffee production, hides and animal products, small-scale handicrafts, transport and military construction, and urban building

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以咖啡、皮革、兽皮、蜂蜡、牲畜及少量农产品为主；进口则包括纺织品、金属制品、机械、燃料、药品、车辆及各类军需物资
tradeGoods.en: Exports consisted mainly of coffee, leather, hides, beeswax, livestock, and limited agricultural produce; imports included textiles, metal goods, machinery, fuel, medicines, vehicles, and military supplies

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富高度分化。绝大多数农村家庭财富主要体现在土地使用权、牲畜、谷物储备和宗族网络中，现金持有极少；城市中意大利定居者和殖民官员拥有明显更高的住房、工资和消费水平。战争与征发使许多本地家庭陷入贫困和流离失所。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. For most rural families, wealth lay chiefly in land use, livestock, grain stores, and kin networks, with very little cash holding; in the towns, Italian settlers and colonial officials enjoyed much higher standards of housing, wages, and consumption. War and requisitioning drove many local households into poverty and displacement.

economicSystem.zh: 经济体制为殖民掠夺与有限国家主导开发相结合的混合体：农村主体仍靠传统农业维生，城市和交通节点则由意大利行政、军方和受补贴企业推动。资源配置首先服务于军事占领、道路修筑、行政整合和欧洲移民安置。
economicSystem.en: The economic system was a hybrid of colonial extraction and limited state-directed development: the rural majority still lived by traditional agriculture, while towns and transport nodes were driven by Italian administration, the military, and subsidized firms. Allocation of resources primarily served military occupation, road construction, administrative integration, and European settler placement.

source.zh: 人头税、牲畜税与地方直接税
source.en: Poll taxes, livestock taxes, and local direct taxes

source.zh: 国家企业、特许经营与垄断收入
source.en: State enterprises, concessions, and monopoly income

source.zh: 许可证费、邮政与行政收费
source.en: Licenses, postal receipts, and administrative fees
Transfers and extraordinary subsidies from Rome

category.zh: 治安、驻军支援与反叛乱

treasuryDescription.zh: 殖民财政高度依赖本土意大利持续输血，地方自给能力很弱。账面库存在行政上存在，但在战争环境、运输困难与驻军需求下可动用空间有限，真正的财政安全取决于罗马的信用、补贴和军需调拨。
treasuryDescription.en: Colonial finances depended heavily on continuing support from metropolitan Italy, and local self-sufficiency was weak. A formal treasury existed on paper, but war conditions, transport difficulties, and garrison demands sharply limited usable liquidity; real fiscal security depended on Rome's credit, subsidies, and military supply allocations.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以赤字殖民建设和治安优先为特征：通过本地征税、关税与特许收入尽量回收占领成本，同时由意大利中央政府承担基础设施与军政扩张的大部分负担。政策目标不是平衡预算，而是巩固统治、促进定居殖民并展示帝国威望。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was characterized by deficit colonial development and security prioritization: local taxation, customs, and concession income were used to recover part of the occupation cost, while the Italian central government bore much of the burden of infrastructure and politico-military expansion. The objective was not budget balance but consolidation of rule, promotion of settler colonialism, and display of imperial prestige.

name.zh: 皇家陆军驻意属东非部队
name.en: Royal Army Forces in Italian East Africa

description.zh: 由意大利本土部队、殖民步兵、炮兵、工兵和支援单位组成，是占领与镇压的骨干力量，重点控制城市、道路和战略高地
description.en: Composed of metropolitan Italian units, colonial infantry, artillery, engineers, and support formations; it formed the backbone of occupation and repression, controlling towns, roads, and strategic highlands

name.zh: 殖民土著部队与阿斯卡里

description.zh: 包括来自厄立特里亚、索马里及其他地区的殖民兵员，用于驻防、侦察、护送和山地清剿，忠诚度与战斗效能因地区和指挥条件而异
description.en: Included colonial soldiers from Eritrea, Somalia, and other areas, used for garrisoning, reconnaissance, escort duty, and mountain sweeps; loyalty and effectiveness varied by region and command conditions

name.zh: 宪兵、警察与黑衫军民兵

description.zh: 承担城市治安、政治镇压、交通线守备和反游击协同任务，是殖民控制中最贴近日常统治的一支力量
description.en: Handled urban security, political repression, line-of-communication defense, and anti-guerrilla cooperation, making them central to the daily practice of colonial control

name.zh: 意属东非空军与航空支援部队
name.en: East African Air Forces and Aviation Support

description.zh: 拥有侦察、运输和轰炸能力，用于联络、空中补给、威慑和对抵抗地区的空袭，但规模和补给受远离本土及海上交通影响
description.en: Possessed reconnaissance, transport, and bombing capabilities for liaison, air supply, intimidation, and strikes on resistance areas, though scale and sustainment were limited by distance from the metropole and sea communications

commanderInChief.zh: 阿梅代奥·迪·萨伏亚-奥斯塔亲王
commanderInChief.en: Prince Amedeo of Savoy-Aosta

technology.zh: 军事实力属于1930年代后期的中等工业化殖民军水平，装备有步枪、机枪、野战炮、装甲车辆、卡车和军用飞机。其优势在于火力、通信和道路沿线机动性，但对高原山地、长期补给和分散游击战适应有限。
technology.en: Military capability was that of a late-1930s medium-industrial colonial force, equipped with rifles, machine guns, field artillery, armored vehicles, trucks, and military aircraft. Its strengths lay in firepower, communications, and mobility along road networks, but it was less suited to highland terrain, sustained logistics, and dispersed guerrilla warfare.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自埃塞俄比亚爱国者游击队、地方性起义、交通线破坏和乡村地区持续不服从；外部上则面临英国在苏丹、肯尼亚和英属索马里方向的潜在军事压力，以及未来欧洲大战扩大的风险。
threats.en: The main threats came from Ethiopian patriot guerrillas, local uprisings, sabotage of communications, and enduring rural noncompliance; externally, the regime faced potential British military pressure from Sudan, Kenya, and British Somaliland, as well as the broader risk of the coming European war.

populationDescription.zh: 人口绝大多数为埃塞俄比亚本地民族与部族社群，分布极不均衡，高原农业区人口最密集。意大利定居者与行政、军人、商人总数仅占极小比例，但在城市、交通节点和殖民机构中拥有压倒性权力。
populationDescription.en: The population consisted overwhelmingly of indigenous Ethiopian ethnic and tribal communities, unevenly distributed with the greatest density in the highland agricultural zones. Italian settlers together with officials, soldiers, and merchants formed only a tiny minority, yet wielded overwhelming power in cities, transport nodes, and colonial institutions.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层大致包括：意大利殖民统治者与定居者；受雇于殖民机构的城市中间层；传统教士、地主和地方贵族残余；广大自耕农、佃农与牧民；以及在战争中流离失所者、劳工和抗意武装支持网络。阶层差异与族群、宗教、地域和是否与殖民政权合作紧密交织。
socialClasses.en: Social classes may be broadly described as: Italian colonial rulers and settlers; urban middle layers employed by colonial institutions; remnants of the traditional clergy, landlords, and provincial nobility; the large mass of peasants, tenants, and pastoralists; and the displaced, laborers, and support networks tied to resistance. Class differences were closely intertwined with ethnicity, religion, region, and degree of collaboration with the colonial regime.

allies.zh: 法西斯意大利、纳粹德国；并在更广义上与轴心体系存在外交一致性
allies.en: Fascist Italy, Nazi Germany; more broadly aligned diplomatically with the Axis system

enemies.zh: 埃塞俄比亚流亡政府与爱国者抵抗力量；英国及其东非、苏丹和中东殖民体系为主要潜在外敌；法国在吉布提方向保持警惕但相对克制
enemies.en: The Ethiopian government-in-exile and patriot resistance forces; Britain and its East African, Sudanese, and Middle Eastern colonial system were the principal potential external enemies; France in the Djibouti direction remained watchful but comparatively restrained

foreignPolicy.zh: 其外交并无独立性，本质上是意大利帝国对红海—东非战略的一部分。核心目标是将埃塞俄比亚既成事实化为意大利帝国领地，争取国际默认，压制流亡外交，并在可能的欧洲大战前巩固东非防御和交通体系。
foreignPolicy.en: It possessed no independent foreign policy, functioning instead as part of Italy's imperial Red Sea-East African strategy. The core goals were to normalize Ethiopia as a fait accompli within the Italian Empire, secure international acquiescence, suppress exile diplomacy, and strengthen East African defense and communications before a possible wider European war.

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术并非本地发明，而是殖民移植：军用航空、无线电通信、汽车化运输、现代道路工程、殖民城市规划、机械化筑路和有限的现代医疗与行政统计技术。传统农业工具与畜力运输在社会总体上仍占主导。
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies were not indigenous innovations but colonial imports: military aviation, radio communications, motor transport, modern road engineering, colonial urban planning, mechanized road building, and limited modern medical and administrative statistical methods. Traditional agricultural tools and animal transport still dominated society as a whole.

strengths.zh: 殖民政权拥有空军、火炮、道路建设能力和意大利帝国资源支持，在主要城市与交通线上保持明显军事优势；亚的斯亚贝巴作为行政中心的整合能力增强；殖民基础设施在局部地区提升了机动性和统治穿透力。
strengths.en: The colonial regime possessed aircraft, artillery, road-building capacity, and support from Italian imperial resources, giving it clear military superiority in major cities and along communications lines; Addis Ababa had been strengthened as an administrative hub; colonial infrastructure improved mobility and state penetration in selected regions.

weaknesses.zh: 统治合法性极低，农村和高原地区抵抗持续不断；财政依赖本土补贴，地方经济薄弱；行政覆盖不均，地形复杂，种族隔离政策加深敌意；一旦与英国开战，海上补给受阻将严重削弱整个占领体系。
weaknesses.en: Its legitimacy was extremely weak, with resistance continuing across rural and highland zones; finances depended on metropolitan subsidy, and the local economy was fragile; administrative reach was uneven, terrain difficult, and racial segregation intensified hostility; if war with Britain came, disruption of sea supply would severely weaken the entire occupation system.

outlook.zh: 1939年的前景表面上仍显稳固，但基础脆弱。若欧洲战争扩大并波及红海与东非，意大利在埃塞俄比亚的统治将面临补给孤立、外敌入侵与内部起义相结合的危机。从长期看，殖民占领难以持久，恢复埃塞俄比亚独立的条件正在积累。
outlook.en: In 1939 the outlook appeared outwardly stable but was fundamentally fragile. If the European war expanded into the Red Sea and East Africa, Italian rule in Ethiopia would face a combined crisis of supply isolation, foreign invasion, and internal uprising. In the longer run, the colonial occupation was unlikely to endure, and conditions for the restoration of Ethiopian independence were accumulating.

description.zh: 埃塞俄比亚在1939年名义上并入意属东非，但抵抗持续存在。
description.en: In 1939, Ethiopia was nominally incorporated into Italian East Africa, though resistance continued.

ruler.zh: 赫伯特·威廉·杰克逊（总督）

governmentForm.zh: 英埃共管下由英国主导的殖民行政体制
governmentForm.en: British-dominated colonial administration under the Anglo-Egyptian condominium

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构呈殖民等级化：英国高级官员居于顶层，其次为受雇于行政、军警和技术部门的埃及人与少量黎凡特、希腊和亚美尼亚侨民；苏丹本地则由部族首领、宗教领袖、城市商人、中下级文书、士兵、牧民与农民构成。南北在行政、教育与宗教政策上存在明显分割。
socialStructure.en: Society was organized in a colonial hierarchy: British senior officials stood at the top, followed by Egyptians and small Levantine, Greek, and Armenian communities employed in administration, security, and technical services; the Sudanese population was structured around tribal chiefs, religious leaders, urban merchants, lower clerks, soldiers, pastoralists, and peasants. North and South were also sharply divided by administrative, educational, and religious policy.

rulingClass.zh: 英国殖民官僚与军政精英，并与受官方承认的地方酋长、部族首领和宗教显贵合作统治
rulingClass.en: British colonial bureaucrats and military-administrative elites, ruling in partnership with officially recognized local chiefs, tribal leaders, and religious notables

succession.zh: 总督由英国政府任命，并以共管名义代表英王与埃及王室行使权力，不实行本地世袭继承
